title: Invisible Crystal
description: Invisible End Crystal - Only viewable with Hitboxes
body:
Invisible End Crystal Overlay – Minecraft 1.21.11


Perfect for PvP, speedrunning, or players who prefer a cleaner visual experience, this overlay helps reduce screen clutter during intense crystal-based combat. You’ll be able to see more clearly without the large crystal frames getting in the way.

Features:

Makes End Crystals  fully invisible
Clean, distraction-free visuals
Ideal for PvP 
Lightweight and performance-friendly
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11

https://www.youtube.com/@mexusmc
